data/maps/LilycoveCity_MoveDeletersHouse.LilycoveCity_MoveDeletersHouse_Text_ICan: Uh...\nOh, yes, I'm the MOVE DELETER.\pI can make POKéMON forget their moves.\pWould you like me to do that?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_MoveDeletersHouse.LilycoveCity_MoveDeletersHouse_Text_Whic: Which POKéMON should forget a move?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_MoveDeletersHouse.LilycoveCity_MoveDeletersHouse_Text_MonH: It worked to perfection!\p{STR_VAR_1} has forgotten\n{STR_VAR_2} completely.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_MoveDeletersHouse.LilycoveCity_MoveDeletersHouse_Text_Come: Come again if there are other moves\nto be forgotten.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_MoveDeletersHouse.LilycoveCity_MoveDeletersHouse_Text_EggC: What?\nNo EGG should know any moves.
